title: JoltMC: Pixelmon
description: Lightweight & Optimized Pixelmon Reforged Modpack for JoltMC. Designed for smooth performance and seamless multiplayer gameplay.
body:
![JoltMC Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b7fcd310fee24fd950d3d183e2cf91464149e9f.png)
# JoltMC: Pixelmon Modpack
Welcome to the JoltMC Pixelmon Modpack—designed to enhance your experience, making it easier and faster to dive into the world of Pixelmon! Our modpack is optimized to reduce load times, allowing for quicker server access and a smoother gameplay experience. But that's not all—players who use this modpack will earn special rewards for simply playing, giving you even more incentives to explore, catch, and train your favorite Pixelmon.

**Join us and enjoy the game like never before!**

## ModList
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [JoltMC Mod](https://discord.gg/joltmc)
- [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Keep The ResourcePack](https://modrinth.com/mod/keep-the-resourcepack)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)
- [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass/version/1.16.5-1.9.1-forge)
- [WorldEdit CUI FE3](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit-cui)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
